properties.headline: AI Engineer | CS Student at UT Dallas
properties.summary: Computer Science student at UT Dallas with production experience in AI/ML engineering, agentic systems, and computer vision. Built systems at Marriott, Snap Inc., and Nova Research. Multiple hackathon winner.
funFacts: 4x hackathon winner — HackSMU Overall (2026), TAMUHack Overall (2025), Headstarter Best Software (2025), Headstarter Best Startup W3 (2025)
Led 12-person Google Developers Group team as President at TAMU
Built agentic observability systems at Marriott using AWS Bedrock
Deployed AR lenses on Snapchat used by real users
Best Freshman Cadet among 700+ cadets at Texas A&M Corps of Cadets
properties.positioning: Senior CS student (Dec 2026, UT Dallas) with hands-on AI engineering across enterprise data systems, NLP, autonomous vehicles, and multimodal applications. Built agentic systems, fine-tuned transformers, deployed inference pipelines on real hardware. Won 4 hackathons. Databricks Student Fellow (<0.01% acceptance). Applying for AI Engineer roles.

why_these_tools.vLLM: high-throughput LLM inference serving, used for RoBERTa deployment at OIT
why_these_tools.LangSmith: LLM observability and tracing, used for debugging agent chains
why_these_tools.DeepEval: LLM evaluation framework, used for RAG quality assessment
